items.time: Lululemon Misses Guidance on Weak 2026 Outlook
items.title: Body: Lululemon (LULU) lowered fiscal 2026 guidance on Tuesday, with Q1 2026 sales guidance of $2.40–$2.43B (vs. $2.47B estimated) and EPS guidance of $1.63–$1.68 (vs. $2.07 estimated). Full-year sales guidance of $11.35–$11.50B also came in below the $11.52B market expectation.
items.summary: Body: Lululemon (LULU) lowered fiscal 2026 guidance on Tuesday, with Q1 2026 sales guidance of $2.40–$2.43B (vs. $2.47B estimated) and EPS guidance of $1.63–$1.68 (vs. $2.07 estimated). Full-year sales guidance of $11.35–$11.50B also came in below the $11.52B market expectation.
